textByHash.423a57028ec62fe40dc896ec8e75192992a97c42: Given the secrecy of our task here, we felt it appropriate to shapeshift into less conspicuous forms.
textByHash.92bffaa3db498450461a37670d985be68d6939a1: Based on your discovery, it is likely our mysterious killer will have travelled here.
textByHash.9f1a52b6016080e7273c8046b8d07659db80ca65: This troll settlement is a relatively new addition to the area. It is what was here before that will be of interest to the killer.
textByHash.76043b5fc0098a01fb42329efe96e5fd372035fd: Indeed. Adventurer, while our disguises will work up to a point, I imagine any troll would soon see through them if we were to converse with them.
textByHash.3976f78f967347459054a84ff212cd8e27f1002f: Our first step here is to gather information. As you claim to be friends with these trolls, you will be well placed to do so.
textByHash.db0b977fb5ec233db3ec3d29e3a1a145079e0972: Speak with their leader and find out if anything of note has occurred here recently.
textByHash.640b3571128516dd9369c0202639e4d4236987ff: Adventurer, speak with the leader of these trolls and find out if anything of note has occurred here recently. That will determine our next move.
textByHash.4aa2f9578c31f4e07c21b9be1c61ebee299fdcd4: Nor mine, but there is no alternative.
textByHash.10aeae02c28a3c31c6bddea608656c6ec91aef30: You waste time we may not have, adventurer, but very well. Ask your questions, but do so quickly.
textByHash.adc4caa92d70a1f326ba8e1c7cfadc55d9e09acd: Now you tell us what you have discovered.
textByHash.cc799def82f5fc2a89138236691af45684f74160: It sounds like we should investigate for ourselves. Adventurer, meet us down in this mine.
textByHash.06ff0419f6ed59b7fcc29b65a598090be2a0c300: Before the God Wars, a settlement of the old empire was found here. The fortress to the east is all that remains on the surface, but there is much still hidden below.
textByHash.88eb17c55d620fc9d353ab0fc5f84a35609eac20: A great prison, sealed long ago. Half of the crest used to do so came into my possession, but it was seemingly taken by the Carnilleans after my defeat.
textByHash.51da4c25e37d13fb019964672a35803ab1cf66c5: It was held by one of our kin, but we haven't felt his presence for some time. It's possible the killer already has it.
textByHash.e99c0ef25ccbde25e9b09e0cb53b7d63d7ad3b3a: What do you know of our kind?
textByHash.e56669d4d89bee72924f49c6b054a421f6a5a745: It may be relevant, it may not be. It depends on who this killer is.
textByHash.7beb7474aa32f48ed198b8fb569c5d81cc7ec23a: The ritual is used by our kind to ensure our survival, and the next one is fast approaching. If the killer is one of our kin, their actions may be a means of preparing for it.
textByHash.155ebbddb8a7640b76c8737e1b054c550a2b7570: For the rest of us to live, one of us must die. Many will go to great lengths to ensure they are not the one who is sacrificed.
textByHash.0ca65e38bc9d00daade10f9e4b570080e43b88ab: We have work to do, adventurer. Don't be gone too long.
textByHash.d4abdbe8694513bde416c81787b500e166bd77ee: Ask your questions, adventurer, but do so quickly.
